subject: Luvale
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Litilicha unapu mulimo wavisonejeka nautala havyuma vyakutaka muvishinganyeka
topics: vyamukakusoneka navyuma vyakuhona kutaka navihana ulemu hachisemwa chavathu.
SETEKO YAKUNANGAKANA: Kutanjika jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha mukutesama.
§ Alweze valongi vatanjike jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha jakuliseza-seza.
